title: LlmJudge Lambda Response
description: Success response schema from the LLM-as-a-Judge Lambda function. Each criterion is evaluated independently in parallel; no overall (aggregated) score is computed by design.

criterion_scores.description: Per-criterion scores keyed by criterion name

criterion_reasoning.description: Per-criterion reasoning keyed by criterion name. When evaluation_steps are defined, each value includes numbered step answers followed by a final summary.

reasoning.description: Executive summary (総評) synthesising findings across all criteria. Generated by an additional judge LLM call after per-criterion scoring.

judge_model.description: The model name used as judge

criterion_reasoning.accuracy:
Step 1: All claims verifiable.
Step 2: No contradictions.

Final: 事実関係は正確。
criterion_reasoning.clarity:
Step 1: Logical structure clear.

Final: 全体的に明快。
criterion_reasoning.helpfulness:
Step 1: Actionable info provided.

Final: 実用的な情報が含まれる。
criterion_reasoning.completeness:
Step 1: Some omissions present.

Final: 主要な観点は網羅。

examples.reasoning: 総評: accuracy 4.5, clarity 4.0, helpfulness 4.0, completeness 3.5。各観点は独立した意味を持つため総合スコアは算出していない。
